prompt: Explain how transformer attention mechanisms work in simple terms, using an analogy a non-technical person could understand:
Explain the difference between model quantization and model pruning, and when you would use each:
Explain what VRAM is, why it matters for running LLMs, and why a 7B model at BF16 needs 14GB of VRAM:
Explain how backpropagation works in neural networks, step by step, as if explaining to a computer science undergraduate:
Write a Python function that implements binary search on a sorted list. Include type hints, docstring, and handle edge cases:
Write a Python class that implements a simple LRU cache with a fixed capacity using only built-in data structures:
Write a Python function that takes a list of benchmark JSON files and returns a pandas DataFrame with columns for model, method, perplexity, and TPS:
Write a Python async function that makes 10 parallel API requests to different URLs and returns all responses, handling timeouts and errors gracefully:
A train leaves City A at 9am traveling at 60 mph toward City B. Another train leaves City B at 10am traveling toward City A at 80 mph. The cities are 280 miles apart. At what time do the trains meet?
You have a 3-gallon jug and a 5-gallon jug, and a water source. How do you measure exactly 4 gallons? Show your steps:
If every 7B LLM at BF16 takes 14GB of VRAM, and you have a GPU with 24GB, how many 7B models could you run simultaneously at INT4 (which uses ~4.5GB each)? Show your reasoning:
A company claims their new quantization method reduces model size by 80% with only 2% quality loss. What questions would you ask to validate this claim, and what experiments would you run?
What are the key architectural differences between BERT (encoder-only) and GPT (decoder-only) transformer models, and what tasks is each best suited for?
What is GGUF format, why was it created to replace GGML, and what are its main advantages for edge LLM deployment?
What are the main differences between GPTQ, AWQ, and bitsandbytes quantization methods? When would you choose each?
Describe the key hardware differences between the NVIDIA RTX 4090 and RTX 5090 (Blackwell), and why sm_120 requires a different PyTorch installation:
Write the opening paragraph of a science fiction story set aboard a generation ship where the AI navigator has been running for 200 years and begins to question its own memories:
Write a short poem (4-8 lines) about the philosophical implications of compressing human knowledge into quantized neural network weights:
Write a dialogue between a software engineer and a 4-bit quantized version of a 70B language model, where the model explains what it feels like to lose precision:
Write the product description for an imaginary neural processing unit designed specifically for running quantized LLMs at the edge, targeting IoT devices with 512MB of RAM:
